allow: Bash(claude -p 'Use get_current_document and reply with the paper title only.' --model haiku --output-format stream-json --verbose --include-partial-messages --strict-mcp-config --allowedTools mcp__refman --mcp-config '{"mcpServers":{"refman":{"command":"__TRACKED_VAR__","args":["--mcp"],"env":{"REFMAN_DB_PATH":"__TRACKED_VAR__","REFMAN_DOCUMENT_ID":"1"}}}}')

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('is_oa:', d.get\('is_oa'\)\); loc=d.get\('best_oa_location'\); print\('pdf:', loc.get\('url_for_pdf'\) if loc else None\); print\('title:', \(d.get\('title'\) or ''\)[:60]\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('is_oa:', d.get\('is_oa'\)\); loc=d.get\('best_oa_location'\); print\('oa_pdf:', loc.get\('url_for_pdf'\) if loc else None\); print\('title:', \(d.get\('title'\) or ''\)[:70]\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; m=json.load\(sys.stdin\)['message']; print\('title:', \(m.get\('title'\) or ['']\)[0][:70]\); print\('links:', [\(l.get\('content-type'\), l.get\('URL'\)\) for l in m.get\('link',[]\)]\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\([l.get\('url_for_pdf'\) for l in d.get\('oa_locations',[]\)][:3]\)")
